name: Checkbox
description: Checkbox is an extension to standard checkbox element with theming.

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the checkbox.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value binding of the checkbox.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the input element.

props.name: binary
props.description: Allows to select a boolean value instead of multiple values.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: When present, it specifies input state as indeterminate.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the element should be disabled.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: readonly
props.description: When present, it specifies that an input field is read-only.

props.name: required
props.description: When present, it specifies that the element is required.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: trueValue
props.description: Value in checked state.

props.name: falseValue
props.description: Value in unchecked state.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: inputClass
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: inputStyle
props.description: Inline style of the input field.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Establishes relationships between the component and label(s) where its value should be one or more element IDs.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Establishes a string value that labels the component.

props.name: formControl
props.description: Form control object, typically used for handling validation and form state.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback to invoke on value change.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * State of the checkbox. */ checked: boolean; /** * Indeterminate state of the checkbox. */ indeterminate?: boolean | undefined; /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
